title: vigna laurentii
intro: Vigna laurentii, also known as the wild horse bean or velvet bean, is a perennial climber native to tropical Asia and Australia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anthelmintic, diuretic, and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Vigna laurentii include its ability to lower cholesterol levels, reduce blood pressure, and provide relief from symptoms of menopause. Vigna laurentii can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat a variety of ailments.
